shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth. Do not redraw Hatch from prompt-only instructions or change his required traits.

prompt_template: Create a flat geometric HackProduct autopsy illustration for [company/product] about [decision or failure mechanism]. Canvas role: [asset role]. Show [specific objects and layout]. Use the canonical Hatch reference at public/images/hatch/hatch-official-mascot.png as [small narrator / main narrator / absent] doing [specific action]. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face and body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. Use warm cream background, forest green structure, amber highlights, charcoal linework. Keep shapes crisp, editorial, and evidence-driven. No human faces, no photorealism, no fake screenshots, no dense text. [Crop instruction]. [Watermark instruction].

assets.prompt: Create a flat geometric HackProduct autopsy illustration for [company/product] about [decision]. Canvas role: hero. Show [specific objects and layout]. Use the official Hatch reference as a small narrator or omit Hatch when crowded. Preserve all required Hatch traits. Use warm cream background, forest green structure, amber highlights, charcoal linework. Keep shapes crisp, editorial, and evidence-driven. No human faces, no photorealism, no fake screenshots, no dense text. Leave quiet space in the upper left for title overlay.
assets.alt: Hero illustration for the [product] autopsy showing [decision mechanism].
assets.caption: The opening visual frames the product decision and the pressure it created.
assets.crop_notes: Essential subject inside center 70 percent. Title space clear upper left.

assets.prompt: Create a flat geometric HackProduct autopsy illustration for [company/product] about [lesson]. Canvas role: hatch-narrator. Show Hatch from the official reference explaining [specific concept] beside [specific evidence object]. Preserve all required Hatch traits. Use warm cream background, forest green structure, amber highlights, charcoal linework. Keep shapes crisp, editorial, and evidence-driven. No human faces, no photorealism, no fake screenshots, no dense text. Keep Hatch centered with room for a short caption outside the image.
assets.alt: Hatch explaining the key autopsy lesson about [specific concept].
assets.caption: Hatch identifies the reader-facing lesson after the evidence is assembled.
assets.crop_notes: Hatch remains fully visible in a square crop.

assets.prompt: Create a flat geometric HackProduct autopsy illustration for [company/product] about [failure or success mechanism]. Canvas role: failure-mechanism. Show [input], [pressure point], and [outcome] connected by clear arrows or sequence bands. Include Hatch from the official reference as a small coach near the pressure point. Preserve all required Hatch traits. Use warm cream background, forest green structure, amber highlights, charcoal linework. No human faces, no photorealism, no fake screenshots, no dense text.
assets.alt: Mechanism diagram showing how [input] led to [outcome] in the [product] autopsy.
assets.caption: The mechanism image explains how the decision changed behavior or risk.
assets.crop_notes: Pressure point stays central. Arrows remain inside safe zone.

assets.prompt: Create a flat geometric HackProduct autopsy illustration for [company/product] about [evidence point]. Canvas role: evidence-card. Show one evidence artifact: [metric / quote card / timeline beat / object]. Use one short label only. Hatch may appear only as a small official-reference reading pose if it does not distract from the proof point. Use warm cream background, forest green structure, amber highlights, charcoal linework. No human faces, no photorealism, no fake screenshots, no dense text.
assets.alt: Evidence card for [product] showing [specific proof point].
assets.caption: The evidence card shows one source-backed artifact, not a fabricated screenshot.
assets.crop_notes: Single label remains legible after a square center crop.

assets.prompt: Create a flat geometric HackProduct autopsy illustration for [company/product] about the transferable lesson [lesson]. Canvas role: lesson-frame. Show Hatch from the official reference coaching from the side while [abstract product decision model] sits in the center. Preserve all required Hatch traits. Use warm cream background, forest green structure, amber highlights, charcoal linework. No human faces, no photorealism, no fake screenshots, no dense text.
assets.alt: Lesson frame showing the transferable product principle from the [product] autopsy.
assets.caption: The lesson frame turns the researched story into a reusable product judgment pattern.
assets.crop_notes: Lesson model stays central. Hatch remains secondary.

assets.prompt: Create a flat geometric HackProduct autopsy illustration for [company/product] about [decision]. Canvas role: thumbnail. Show one bold focal shape that represents [decision mechanism]. Include Hatch only as a tiny official-reference narrator mark if needed. Preserve all required Hatch traits. Use warm cream background, forest green structure, amber highlights, charcoal linework. No human faces, no photorealism, no fake screenshots, no dense text. Make the decision readable at small size with one strong focal shape. Add small HackProduct watermark bottom right.
assets.caption: The thumbnail keeps the story recognizable in the index grid.

assets.prompt: Create a flat geometric HackProduct autopsy illustration for [company/product] about [decision]. Canvas role: social-cover. Show [specific focal mechanism] with room for social preview cropping. Include Hatch from the official reference as a small celebrating narrator on the right edge or omit Hatch if the composition is crowded. Preserve all required Hatch traits. Use warm cream background, forest green structure, amber highlights, charcoal linework. No human faces, no photorealism, no fake screenshots, no dense text. Keep the center 70 percent clear of edge-critical details. Add small HackProduct watermark bottom right.
assets.alt: Social cover for the [product] autopsy showing [decision mechanism].
assets.caption: The social cover is built for link previews and must avoid implied company endorsement.

qa_checklist: Product, story, and decision are visible without body copy.
Hatch pose matches the role, preserves official traits, and does not steal focus.
Palette uses approved colors or a documented exception.
No human faces, photorealistic stock scenes, fake UI screenshots, or dense text.
Crop survives the listed safe crops.
Thumbnail is readable at 320 px wide.
Alt text states the image function.
Manifest includes prompt, reference asset, reference SHA-256, source status, crop notes, and QA status.
